pages.raw_text:
Secretary Rice of the Greater
Spokane committee hasn't been
back in the booster harness very
long, but the big projects mapped
out for the summer are already
oiled up and in running order. This
morning he mailed out the assess
ments fixed upon among. the real
estate men of the city who have
agreed to contribute $4,000 of the
$1,000 that will be needed to carry
out the Greater Spokane plans
The assessments range from SIS to
$40.


These include the national irrl-
CATION congress, the biggest and
most important public event in the
western states; the national apple
show, which Spokane made fam
GUS last year and which in turn
added to Spokane's fame: a pub
licity campaign on a bigger and
more systematic scale than before
attempted and an advertising cam
paign among visitors to the A. Y.
p. exposition that will skim a big
share of the cream of the western
movement on account of the fair.


Spokane boosting has suffered
some since the old get-results
working combination has been out
of 1t temporarily, but with the
work now outlined whatever lapse
there has been will be more than
made up before the year is ended.
